channel.title: GitHub Makefile Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: ailabstw/social-distancing
item.description: A simple, decentralized. privacy-reserving contact tracing system

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification
item.description: Specifications for OpenTelemetry

item.title: jobbole/awesome-python-cn
item.description: Python资源大全中文版，包括：Web框架、网络爬虫、模板引擎、数据库、数据可视化、图片处理等，由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」微信公号团队维护更新。

item.description: Module to enable Chatbot Slack channel configuration in Terraform

item.description: Protobuf definition for Chief Of State

item.description: I'm here to tell you some amazing stuff which teacher would never tell you.
